ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the game */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's image */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the game */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme of the game */,
  "platform_manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform manufacturer of the game */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer of the game */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the game */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the game (e.g., E, M, T) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Supported languages of the game */,
  "is_multiplayer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game supports multiplayer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the game information was updated */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform the game is available on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_platform_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_manufacturer_id") REFERENCES platform_manufacturers ("platform_manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "parent_theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_themes_parent_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_manufacturers" (
  "platform_manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform manufacturer */,
  "platform_manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform manufacturer */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "platform_manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform manufacturer */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the platform was released */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the platform information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platforms_platform_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_manufacturer_id") REFERENCES platform_manufacturers ("platform_manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is featured */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the review was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the developer */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the developer was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the developer's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_developers" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer in the game (e.g., lead developer, co-developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publisher */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the publisher's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_publishers" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the publisher in the game (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is an admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Patch notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_platforms" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released on the platform */,
  "is_exclusive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is exclusive to the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "platform_id")
)
